title: GitHub Pilot Onboarding Package

business_justification.json.purpose: Document why USBAY needs a GitHub App before any app creation occurs.
validation_rules: approval_references must include USBAY-AUDIT and USBAY-GLOBAL23

risk_assessment.json.purpose: Identify risks from GitHub App creation and define mitigation before authority is granted.
validation_rules: mutation_risks must include repository mutation risk
credential_risks must include private key handling risk
mitigations must map to identified risks
approval_references must include USBAY-AUDIT and USBAY-GLOBAL23

permission_manifest.json.purpose: Define the minimum GitHub App permissions for pilot onboarding.
validation_rules: organization_permissions must be empty unless separately approved
forbidden_permissions must include administration:write by default
capability_mapping must map every permission to a connector capability

repository_scope.json.purpose: Define the exact repository scope for initial GitHub App installation.
validation_rules: approval_references must include USBAY-AUDIT and USBAY-GLOBAL23

installation_scope.json.purpose: Define installation-level constraints for the GitHub App.
validation_rules: denied_capabilities must include production mutation until activation review

rollback_plan.json.purpose: Define how GitHub App creation or onboarding can be reversed safely.
validation_rules: rollback_triggers must include credential incident and scope mismatch

audit_authority_record.json.purpose: Define who owns audit review and evidence acceptance for GitHub App creation.
validation_rules: required_audit_outputs must include creation, credential, approval, and rollback records

credential_authority_record.json.purpose: Define who may generate, store, rotate, revoke, and audit GitHub App credentials.
validation_rules: secret_reference_policy must permit hash-only repository evidence

package_validation_rules: All eight onboarding templates must exist in this package definition.
Every template must define purpose, required_fields, validation_rules, and fail_closed_checks.
Every template requiring approvals must include USBAY-AUDIT and USBAY-GLOBAL23 approval references.
No template may permit raw credential storage in repository evidence.
No template may authorize production activation.
Any missing required field in a populated onboarding artifact must block GitHub App creation.
evidence_still_missing_before_first_gith: Populated business_justification.json with real request evidence.
Populated risk_assessment.json with reviewer-approved risk evidence.
Populated permission_manifest.json with exact GitHub App permission request.
Populated repository_scope.json with exact pilot repository scope.
Populated installation_scope.json with exact installation constraints.
Populated rollback_plan.json with approved rollback evidence.
Populated credential_authority_record.json with storage, rotation, revocation, and incident response authority.
Approval records from USBAY-AUDIT and USBAY-GLOBAL23.
Audit record linking all package artifacts.

acceptance_answers.is_every_required_onboarding_artifact_de: Yes. All eight requested onboarding package templates are defined.
acceptance_answers.is_the_package_complete: Yes as a template package. It is not complete as live onboarding evidence until each template is populated with real evidence and approved.

generated_pr_metadata.commit_title: PB-046 VERIFIED: GitHub Pilot Onboarding Package
generated_pr_metadata.pr_title: PB-046 VERIFIED: GitHub Pilot Onboarding Package

generated_pr_body:
## PURPOSE
PB-046 creates the template package required before the first USBAY GitHub App may be created.

## RISK
If onboarding artifacts are incomplete or ambiguous, USBAY could create a GitHub App without business justification, risk review, permission boundaries, repository scope, rollback, audit authority, credential authority, or required approvals.

## POLICY LINK
AGENTS.md fail-closed, audit-first engineering, human oversight, branch governance, network governance, and secret/data hygiene rules. PB-045 GitHub App Creation Authority.

## REQUIRED APPROVALS
USBAY-AUDIT and USBAY-GLOBAL23 must approve populated onboarding evidence before any GitHub App creation. This PB does not create the app, credentials, API calls, mutations, or production activation.

## GOVERNANCE CHECKS
JSON evidence must parse. All eight templates must define required fields, validation rules, fail-closed checks, and approval references where required. Diff hygiene and conflict marker scan must pass.

## AUDIT
PB-046 generates governance/evidence/pb046/github_pilot_onboarding_package.json and governance/evidence/pb046/github_pilot_onboarding_summary.md with template definitions, validation rules, fail-closed checks, approval references, and missing evidence before creation.

## IMPACT
USBAY gains a complete onboarding package structure while keeping first GitHub App creation blocked until the templates are populated, approved, and audit-linked.

## Decision
VERIFIED

## Status
READY_FOR_REVIEW
